examples: Many parents may baulk at the idea of paying $100 for a pair of shoes.
The builder shored up the wall with a thick baulk of wood.
Place the cue ball on the brown spot and attempt to hit it along the baulk line.
Eurozone governments may be asked to fill that gap and some countries will baulk at reaching into their pockets yet again.
Ministers know that workers who've tolerated pay freezes, job cuts and much besides may baulk at working longer and paying more for their pensions.
